size.label: Wide Shot
size.description: Full environment visible, subject small in frame.

size.label: Medium Wide Shot
size.description: Subject from knees up with environment context.

size.label: Extreme Close-Up
size.description: Tight on a single detail (eye, hand, object).

size.label: Point of View
size.description: Camera represents a character's literal viewpoint.

size.label: Over the Shoulder
size.description: Framed past one character's shoulder toward another.

size.label: Establishing Shot
size.description: Opens a scene by showing where the action takes place. Typically very wide.

size.label: Full Shot
size.description: Subject visible head to toe, filling the frame vertically.

size.label: Cowboy Shot
size.description: Subject from mid-thigh up. Classic western holster framing.

size.label: Insert Shot
size.description: Tight cutaway of an object or detail that carries story information.

size.label: Group Shot
size.description: Four or more subjects framed together.

angle.label: Eye Level
angle.description: Camera at subject's eye height. Neutral perspective.

angle.label: Low Angle
angle.description: Camera below subject, looking up. Conveys power or menace.

angle.label: High Angle
angle.description: Camera above subject, looking down. Conveys vulnerability.

angle.label: Dutch Angle
angle.description: Camera tilted on its roll axis. Conveys unease or disorientation.

angle.label: Bird's Eye
angle.description: Camera directly overhead. God-like or surveillance perspective.

angle.label: Worm's Eye
angle.description: Camera at ground level looking up. Extreme low angle.

angle.label: Profile
angle.description: Subject framed side-on at 90 degrees. Formal, observational.

angle.label: Three-Quarter
angle.description: Subject turned roughly 45 degrees from camera. The standard portrait and reference-sheet angle.

lens.label: Macro Lens
lens.description: Extreme close focus for tiny details.

lens.label: Anamorphic Lens
lens.description: Widescreen with characteristic lens flares and oval bokeh.

move.label: Static
move.description: Camera is locked off. No movement.

move.label: Pan
move.description: Camera rotates horizontally on its axis.

move.label: Tilt
move.description: Camera rotates vertically on its axis.

move.label: Dolly
move.description: Camera moves toward or away from subject on a track.

move.label: Handheld
move.description: Camera is handheld. Organic, unstable feel.

move.label: Drone
move.description: Aerial camera movement. Sweeping or hovering.

move.label: Zoom In
move.description: Focal length increases during the shot. Subject grows in frame without camera travel.

move.label: Zoom Out
move.description: Focal length decreases during the shot. Frame widens without camera travel.

move.label: Dolly Zoom
move.description: Dolly and zoom in opposition (Vertigo effect). Background perspective warps around a constant subject.

move.label: Arc / Orbit
move.description: Camera circles the subject on a curved path.

move.label: Truck
move.description: Camera travels laterally, parallel to the subject.

move.label: Pedestal
move.description: Camera raises or lowers vertically without tilting.

move.label: Whip Pan
move.description: Violently fast pan that blurs the frame. Energy or transition device.

move.label: Roll
move.description: Camera rotates on its lens axis during the shot.

move.label: Push In
move.description: Slow forward move toward the subject. Builds intensity or intimacy.

move.label: Pull Out
move.description: Slow backward move away from the subject. Reveals context or isolates.

light.label: Natural Light
light.description: Ambient daylight or available light. Realistic.

light.label: Film Noir
light.description: High contrast, deep shadows, hard light sources.

light.label: High Key
light.description: Bright, even lighting. Minimal shadows. Clean feel.

light.label: Golden Hour
light.description: Warm, soft directional light. Magic hour look.

light.label: Blue Hour
light.description: Cool ambient twilight. Pre-dawn or post-sunset.

light.label: Practical Lighting
light.description: Light sources visible in frame (lamps, candles, screens).

light.label: Neon
light.description: Saturated colored light. Urban, cyberpunk aesthetic.

light.label: Silhouette
light.description: Subject rendered as a dark shape against a brighter background. Identity concealed, gesture emphasized.

light.label: Backlit
light.description: Key light behind the subject. Rim glow, haloed edges, atmospheric depth.

light.label: Rembrandt
light.description: Classic portrait key: one side lit, a triangle of light on the shadowed cheek.

light.label: Moonlight
light.description: Cool, dim, directional night light with soft shadows.

light.label: Firelight
light.description: Warm flickering light from flames. Restless shadows, orange cast.

light.label: Overcast
light.description: Soft, diffuse, shadowless daylight under cloud cover.

light.label: Harsh Sun
light.description: Direct midday sunlight. Hard shadows, squinting brightness, bleached highlights.

light.label: Strobe
light.description: Pulsing intermittent light. Club scenes, alarms, staccato motion.

light.label: Volumetric
light.description: Visible light rays through atmosphere: god rays, dusty beams, fog-scattered shafts.

tod.label: Later
tod.description: An unspecified jump forward in time from the previous scene.

tod.label: Same
tod.description: Same time as the previous scene, resuming after a cutaway.

tod.label: Continuous
tod.description: Continuous with the previous scene. No time jump. Previous scene = previous by act order, then scene_refs order.

dof.label: Deep Focus
dof.description: Everything in frame is sharp. Large depth of field.

dof.label: Shallow Focus
dof.description: Subject sharp, background blurred. Isolates subject.

dof.label: Rack Focus
dof.description: Focus shifts between planes during the shot.

dof.label: Split Diopter
dof.description: Two planes sharp at once with a soft seam between them. Foreground and background both in focus.

dof.label: Tilt-Shift
dof.description: Selective plane of focus that miniaturizes the scene.

aspect.label: Vertical 9:16
aspect.description: Portrait frame for mobile and shorts.

aspect.label: Classic 4:3
aspect.description: Academy-adjacent TV frame. Retro or intimate feel.

color.label: Teal & Orange
color.description: Complementary blockbuster grade: teal shadows, orange skin tones.

color.label: Sepia
color.description: Brown-toned monochrome. Archival or period feel.

color.label: Desaturated
color.description: Muted, drained color. Bleak or gritty grading.

color.label: Bleach Bypass
color.description: Silver-retained look: high contrast, crushed saturation, metallic sheen.

mood.label: Foreboding
mood.description: Dread of what is coming. Storm-front tension.

weather.label: Snow
weather.description: Falling or settled snow. Muffled sound, high albedo.

weather.label: Fog
weather.description: Thick atmospheric haze. Depth cues compressed, shapes dissolve.

weather.label: Storm
weather.description: Active storm: wind, lightning, driving rain.

weather.label: Wind
weather.description: Strong wind. Moving hair, fabric, vegetation, debris.

weather.label: Overcast
weather.description: Full cloud cover. Flat gray sky.

weather.label: Heat Haze
weather.description: Shimmering air distortion above hot surfaces.

texture.label: 35mm Film
texture.description: 35mm film-stock emulation: fine grain, halation, organic color response.

texture.label: 16mm Film
texture.description: 16mm film-stock emulation: coarse grain, documentary energy.

texture.label: Digital Clean
texture.description: Pristine digital capture. No grain, clinical sharpness.

texture.label: VHS
texture.description: Analog tape artifacts: tracking noise, chroma bleed, soft scanlines.

texture.label: Grainy
texture.description: Pronounced visible grain without a specific stock reference.

transition.label: Cut
transition.description: Instant transition to the next shot. The default.

transition.label: Dissolve
transition.description: Outgoing and incoming images cross-fade. Signals passage of time or connection.

transition.label: Fade In
transition.description: Image emerges from black (or white). Openings and awakenings.

transition.label: Fade Out
transition.description: Image sinks to black (or white). Endings and finality.

transition.label: Smash Cut
transition.description: Abrupt cut across strong contrast: loud to silent, calm to chaos.

transition.label: Match Cut
transition.description: Cut where composition, shape, or motion matches across the edit.

transition.label: Wipe
transition.description: Incoming image pushes the outgoing one off along an edge or shape.

transition.label: Iris
transition.description: Circular aperture opens or closes over the frame. Silent-era flourish.

transition.label: Whip
transition.description: Whip-pan blur bridges two shots as one continuous motion.
